changeSet.author: claude

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'Amikacin' AND item_type = 'ANTIBIOTICS';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item (id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, low_stock_threshold, expiration_alert_days, is_active) VALUES (nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'Amikacin', 'Aminoglycoside antibiotic (AMK)', 'ANTIBIOTICS', 'Aminoglycosides', 'Generic', 'AMK-STD', '15-25°C', 'discs', 5, 365, 'Y');

changeSet.author: claude
